domain: Responsible for user authentication and authorization.

bounded_contexts.name: Authentication
bounded_contexts.purpose: Responsible for user authentication and authorization.

bounded_contexts.name: Catalog Management
bounded_contexts.purpose: Handles the management of films, actors, categories, and related entities.

bounded_contexts.name: Location Management
bounded_contexts.purpose: Responsible for managing geographical and location-related data.

bounded_contexts.name: Payment Processing
bounded_contexts.purpose: Handles payment transactions and related operations.

bounded_contexts.name: Rental Management
bounded_contexts.purpose: Manages rental transactions and related entities.

bounded_contexts.name: Store Management
bounded_contexts.purpose: Responsible for managing store inventory and sales.

business_rules.name: Film ID must not be null
business_rules.description: Ensures that every inventory record is associated with a valid film.

business_rules.name: Store ID must not be null
business_rules.description: Ensures that every inventory record is associated with a valid store.

business_rules.name: Last update timestamp must not be null
business_rules.description: Ensures that every record has a last update timestamp for tracking changes.
business_rules.source_method: InventoryEntity, StoreEntity, StaffEntity, RentalEntity, PaymentEntity, AddressEntity, CityEntity, CountryEntity, LanguageEntity, CustomerEntity, ActorEntity, FilmEntity, FilmCategoryEntity, FilmActorEntity

business_rules.name: Username size constraint
business_rules.description: Ensures that the username is between 1 and 16 characters.

business_rules.name: Address must not be null and must have valid size
business_rules.description: Ensures that the address is provided and within the specified size limits.

business_rules.name: District must not be null and must have valid size
business_rules.description: Ensures that the district is provided and within the specified size limits.

business_rules.name: Phone must not be null and must have valid size
business_rules.description: Ensures that the phone number is provided and within the specified size limits.

business_rules.name: Email must be valid and not null
business_rules.description: Ensures that the email is valid and provided for user authentication.

business_rules.name: Transaction boundaries for read operations
business_rules.description: Read operations are executed in a read-only transaction to prevent data modification.

business_rules.name: Transaction boundaries for write operations
business_rules.description: Write operations are executed in a transactional context to ensure data integrity.

business_rules.name: Active status must be true for customers and staff
business_rules.description: Ensures that only active customers and staff can perform certain operations.

business_rules.name: Authority ID must not be null
business_rules.description: Ensures that every staff and customer is assigned a valid authority.

business_rules.name: Rental duration must be specified
business_rules.description: Ensures that every film has a defined rental duration.

business_rules.name: Rental rate must be specified
business_rules.description: Ensures that every film has a defined rental rate.

business_rules.name: Replacement cost must be specified
business_rules.description: Ensures that every film has a defined replacement cost.

business_rules.name: Film title must not be null and must have valid size
business_rules.description: Ensures that every film has a title that is provided and within the specified size limits.

business_rules.name: Film description must have valid size
business_rules.description: Ensures that the film description is within the specified size limits.

use_cases.name: Report Sales by Category
use_cases.description: As a manager, I want to view sales reports by category so that I can analyze performance across different product categories.
preconditions: User has permission to view sales reports
steps: User requests sales report by category
System retrieves sales data grouped by category
System returns the report to the user

use_cases.name: Report Sales by Store
use_cases.description: As a manager, I want to view sales reports by store so that I can evaluate store performance.
preconditions: User has permission to view sales reports
steps: User requests sales report by store
System retrieves sales data grouped by store
System returns the report to the user

use_cases.name: Manage Store List
use_cases.description: As an administrator, I want to manage the list of stores so that I can ensure accurate store information.
preconditions: User has permission to manage stores
steps: User requests the list of stores
System retrieves the list of stores
System displays the list to the user
postconditions: User views the list of stores

use_cases.name: Add New Store
use_cases.description: As an administrator, I want to add a new store so that I can expand the business.
preconditions: User has permission to add stores
steps: User submits store details
System validates the input
System adds the new store to the database

use_cases.name: Update Store Information
use_cases.description: As an administrator, I want to update store information so that I can keep the data accurate.
preconditions: User has permission to update stores
steps: User submits updated store information
System validates the input
System updates the store information in the database

use_cases.name: Delete Store
use_cases.description: As an administrator, I want to delete a store so that I can remove outdated or incorrect entries.
preconditions: User has permission to delete stores
steps: User requests to delete a store
System verifies the request
System deletes the store from the database

use_cases.name: Manage Staff List
use_cases.description: As an administrator, I want to manage the list of staff so that I can ensure accurate staff information.
preconditions: User has permission to manage staff
steps: User requests the list of staff
System retrieves the list of staff
System displays the list to the user
postconditions: User views the list of staff

use_cases.name: Add New Staff
use_cases.description: As an administrator, I want to add a new staff member so that I can ensure proper staffing.
preconditions: User has permission to add staff
steps: User submits staff details
System validates the input
System adds the new staff member to the database
postconditions: New staff member is added successfully

use_cases.name: Update Staff Information
use_cases.description: As an administrator, I want to update staff information so that I can keep the data accurate.
preconditions: User has permission to update staff
steps: User submits updated staff information
System validates the input
System updates the staff information in the database

use_cases.name: Delete Staff
use_cases.description: As an administrator, I want to delete a staff member so that I can remove outdated or incorrect entries.
preconditions: User has permission to delete staff
steps: User requests to delete a staff member
System verifies the request
System deletes the staff member from the database

use_cases.name: Manage Rental List
use_cases.description: As a staff member, I want to manage the list of rentals so that I can track customer rentals.
preconditions: User has permission to manage rentals
steps: User requests the list of rentals
System retrieves the list of rentals
System displays the list to the user
postconditions: User views the list of rentals

use_cases.name: Rent DVD
use_cases.description: As a customer, I want to rent a DVD so that I can enjoy watching it.
steps: Customer selects a DVD to rent
Staff member processes the rental
System records the rental transaction

use_cases.name: Return DVD
use_cases.description: As a customer, I want to return a DVD so that I can complete my rental transaction.
preconditions: DVD was rented by the customer
steps: Customer returns the DVD
Staff member processes the return
System updates the rental status

steps: User requests the list of payments

use_cases.name: Create Payment
use_cases.description: As a customer, I want to make a payment so that I can settle my rental transactions.
